metadata.significance: Begins with qualities of successful believers, emphasizes afterlife

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ قَدْ أَفْلَحَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qad aflaha almuminoona

translations.en_sahih: Certainly will the believers have succeeded:
translations.en_yusufali: The believers must (eventually) win through,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya berjayalah orang-orang yang beriman,

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ فِى صَلَاتِهِمْ خَـٰشِعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Allatheena hum fee salatihim khashiAAoona

translations.en_sahih: They who are during their prayer humbly submissive
translations.en_yusufali: Those who humble themselves in their prayers;
translations.ms_basmeih: Iaitu mereka yang khusyuk dalam sembahyangnya;

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عَنِ ٱللَّغْوِ مُعْرِضُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waallatheena hum AAani allaghwi muAAridoona

translations.en_sahih: And they who turn away from ill speech
translations.en_yusufali: Who avoid vain talk;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan mereka yang menjauhkan diri dari perbuatan dan perkataan yang sia-sia;

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ لِلزَّكَوٰةِ فَـٰعِلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waallatheena hum lilzzakati faAAiloona

translations.en_sahih: And they who are observant of zakah
translations.en_yusufali: Who are active in deeds of charity;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan mereka yang berusaha membersihkan hartanya (dengan menunaikan zakat harta itu);

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ لِفُرُوجِهِمْ حَـٰفِظُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waallatheena hum lifuroojihim hafithoona

translations.en_sahih: And they who guard their private parts
translations.en_yusufali: Who abstain from sex,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan mereka yang menjaga kehormatannya, -

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا عَلَىٰٓ أَزْوَٰجِهِمْ أَوْ مَا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَـٰنُهُمْ فَإِنَّهُمْ غَيْرُ مَلُومِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Illa AAala azwajihim aw ma malakat aymanuhum fainnahum ghayru maloomeena

translations.en_sahih: Except from their wives or those their right hands possess, for indeed, they will not be blamed -
translations.en_yusufali: Except with those joined to them in the marriage bond, or (the captives) whom their right hands possess,- for (in their case) they are free from blame,
translations.ms_basmeih: Kecuali kepada isterinya atau hamba sahayanya maka sesungguhnya mereka tidak tercela: -

ayahs.arabic: فَمَنِ ٱبْتَغَىٰ وَرَآءَ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْعَادُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Famani ibtagha waraa thalika faolaika humu alAAadoona

translations.en_sahih: But whoever seeks beyond that, then those are the transgressors -
translations.en_yusufali: But those whose desires exceed those limits are transgressors;-
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian, sesiapa yang mengingini selain dari yang demikian, maka merekalah orang-orang yang melampaui batas;

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ لِأَمَـٰنَـٰتِهِمْ وَعَهْدِهِمْ رَٰعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waallatheena hum liamanatihim waAAahdihim raAAoona

translations.en_sahih: And they who are to their trusts and their promises attentive
translations.en_yusufali: Those who faithfully observe their trusts and their covenants;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan mereka yang menjaga amanah dan janjinya;

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عَلَىٰ صَلَوَٰتِهِمْ يُحَافِظُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waallatheena hum AAala salawatihim yuhafithoona

translations.en_sahih: And they who carefully maintain their prayers -
translations.en_yusufali: And who (strictly) guard their prayers;-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan mereka yang tetap memelihara sembahyangnya;

ayahs.arabic: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْوَٰرِثُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Olaika humu alwarithoona

translations.en_sahih: Those are the inheritors
translations.en_yusufali: These will be the heirs,
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka itulah orang-orang yang berhak mewarisi -

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَرِثُونَ ٱلْفِرْدَوْسَ هُمْ فِيهَا خَـٰلِدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Allatheena yarithoona alfirdawsa hum feeha khalidoona

translations.en_sahih: Who will inherit al-Firdaus. They will abide therein eternally.
translations.en_yusufali: Who will inherit Paradise: they will dwell therein (for ever).
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang akan mewarisi Syurga Firdaus; mereka kekal di dalamnya.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مِن سُلَـٰلَةٍ مِّن طِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad khalaqna alinsana min sulalatin min teenin

translations.en_sahih: And certainly did We create man from an extract of clay.
translations.en_yusufali: Man We did create from a quintessence (of clay);
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Kami telah menciptakan manusia dari pati (yang berasal) dari tanah;

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ جَعَلْنَـٰهُ نُطْفَةً فِى قَرَارٍ مَّكِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma jaAAalnahu nutfatan fee qararin makeenin

translations.en_sahih: Then We placed him as a sperm-drop in a firm lodging.
translations.en_yusufali: Then We placed him as (a drop of) sperm in a place of rest, firmly fixed;
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian Kami jadikan "pati" itu (setitis) air benih pada penetapan yang kukuh;

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ خَلَقْنَا ٱلنُّطْفَةَ عَلَقَةً فَخَلَقْنَا ٱلْعَلَقَةَ مُضْغَةً فَخَلَقْنَا ٱلْمُضْغَةَ عِظَـٰمًا فَكَسَوْنَا ٱلْعِظَـٰمَ لَحْمًا ثُمَّ أَنشَأْنَـٰهُ خَلْقًا ءَاخَرَ ۚ فَتَبَارَكَ ٱللَّهُ أَحْسَنُ ٱلْخَـٰلِقِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma khalaqna alnnutfata AAalaqatan fakhalaqna alAAalaqata mudghatan fakhalaqna almudghata AAithaman fakasawna alAAithama lahman thumma anshanahu khalqan akhara fatabaraka Allahu ahsanu alkhaliqeena

translations.en_sahih: Then We made the sperm-drop into a clinging clot, and We made the clot into a lump [of flesh], and We made [from] the lump, bones, and We covered the bones with flesh; then We developed him into another creation. So blessed is Allah, the best of creators.
translations.en_yusufali: Then We made the sperm into a clot of congealed blood; then of that clot We made a (foetus) lump; then we made out of that lump bones and clothed the bones with flesh; then we developed out of it another creature. So blessed be Allah, the best to create!
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian Kami ciptakan air benih itu menjadi sebuku darah beku. lalu Kami ciptakan darah beku itu menjadi seketul daging; kemudian Kami ciptakan daging itu menjadi beberapa tulang; kemudian Kami balut tulang-tulang itu dengan daging. Setelah sempurna kejadian itu Kami bentuk dia menjadi makhluk yang lain sifat keadaannya. Maka nyatalah kelebihan dan ketinggian Allah sebaik-baik Pencipta.

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ إِنَّكُم بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ لَمَيِّتُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma innakum baAAda thalika lamayyitoona

translations.en_sahih: Then indeed, after that you are to die.
translations.en_yusufali: After that, at length ye will die
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian, sesungguhnya kamu sesudah itu akan mati.

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ إِنَّكُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ تُبْعَثُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma innakum yawma alqiyamati tubAAathoona

translations.en_sahih: Then indeed you, on the Day of Resurrection, will be resurrected.
translations.en_yusufali: Again, on the Day of Judgment, will ye be raised up.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian sesungguhnya kamu akan dibangkitkan hidup semula pada hari kiamat.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا فَوْقَكُمْ سَبْعَ طَرَآئِقَ وَمَا كُنَّا عَنِ ٱلْخَلْقِ غَـٰفِلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad khalaqna fawqakum sabAAa taraiqa wama kunna AAani alkhalqi ghafileena

translations.en_sahih: And We have created above you seven layered heavens, and never have We been of [Our] creation unaware.
translations.en_yusufali: And We have made, above you, seven tracts; and We are never unmindful of (our) Creation.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya, Kami telah menciptakan tujuh jalan di atas kamu, dan Kami pula tidak lalai daripada (menyediakan keperluan) makhluk-makhluk Kami.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَنزَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءًۢ بِقَدَرٍ فَأَسْكَنَّـٰهُ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَإِنَّا عَلَىٰ ذَهَابٍۭ بِهِۦ لَقَـٰدِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waanzalna mina alssamai maan biqadarin faaskannahu fee alardi wainna AAala thahabin bihi laqadiroona

translations.en_sahih: And We have sent down rain from the sky in a measured amount and settled it in the earth. And indeed, We are Able to take it away.
translations.en_yusufali: And We send down water from the sky according to (due) measure, and We cause it to soak in the soil; and We certainly are able to drain it off (with ease).
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami turunkan hujan dari langit dengan sukatan yang tertentu, serta Kami tempatkan dia tersimpan di bumi; dan sesungguhnya Kami sudah tentu berkuasa melenyapkannya.

ayahs.arabic: فَأَنشَأْنَا لَكُم بِهِۦ جَنَّـٰتٍ مِّن نَّخِيلٍ وَأَعْنَـٰبٍ لَّكُمْ فِيهَا فَوَٰكِهُ كَثِيرَةٌ وَمِنْهَا تَأْكُلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faanshana lakum bihi jannatin min nakheelin waaAAnabin lakum feeha fawakihu katheeratun waminha takuloona

translations.en_sahih: And We brought forth for you thereby gardens of palm trees and grapevines in which for you are abundant fruits and from which you eat.
translations.en_yusufali: With it We grow for you gardens of date-palms and vines: in them have ye abundant fruits: and of them ye eat (and have enjoyment),-
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian, Kami tumbuhkan untuk kamu dengan air itu, kebun-kebun tamar (kurma) dan anggur. Kamu beroleh dalam kebun-kebun itu (berbagai jenis lagi) buah-buahan yang banyak, dan dari kebun-kebun itulah kamu beroleh rezeki penghidupan kamu.

ayahs.arabic: وَشَجَرَةً تَخْرُجُ مِن طُورِ سَيْنَآءَ تَنۢبُتُ بِٱلدُّهْنِ وَصِبْغٍ لِّلْـَٔاكِلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Washajaratan takhruju min toori saynaa tanbutu bialdduhni wasibghin lilakileena

translations.en_sahih: And [We brought forth] a tree issuing from Mount Sinai which produces oil and food for those who eat.
translations.en_yusufali: Also a tree springing out of Mount Sinai, which produces oil, and relish for those who use it for food.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (Kami juga menumbuhkan untuk kamu) pokok yang asal tumbuhnya di kawasan Gunung Tursina, yang mengeluarkan minyak dan lauk bagi orang-orang yang makan.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنَّ لَكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَنْعَـٰمِ لَعِبْرَةً ۖ نُّسْقِيكُم مِّمَّا فِى بُطُونِهَا وَلَكُمْ فِيهَا مَنَـٰفِعُ كَثِيرَةٌ وَمِنْهَا تَأْكُلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wainna lakum fee alanAAami laAAibratan nusqeekum mimma fee butooniha walakum feeha manafiAAu katheeratun waminha takuloona

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, for you in livestock is a lesson. We give you drink from that which is in their bellies, and for you in them are numerous benefits, and from them you eat.
translations.en_yusufali: And in cattle (too) ye have an instructive example: from within their bodies We produce (milk) for you to drink; there are, in them, (besides), numerous (other) benefits for you; and of their (meat) ye eat;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya pada binatang-binatang ternak itu kamu beroleh punca-punca yang menyedarkan (tentang kemurahan dan kebijaksanaan Allah penciptanya); Kami beri kamu minum dari susu yang ada dalam perutnya, dan kamu beroleh banyak faedah lagi padanya; dan daripadanya juga kamu beroleh rezeki penghidupan kamu.

ayahs.arabic: وَعَلَيْهَا وَعَلَى ٱلْفُلْكِ تُحْمَلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: WaAAalayha waAAala alfulki tuhmaloona

translations.en_sahih: And upon them and on ships you are carried.
translations.en_yusufali: And on them, as well as in ships, ye ride.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan di atas binatang-binatang ternak itu, serta di atas kapal-kapal kamu diangkut.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ فَقَالَ يَـٰقَوْمِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِّنْ إِلَـٰهٍ غَيْرُهُۥٓ ۖ أَفَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad arsalna noohan ila qawmihi faqala ya qawmi oAAbudoo Allaha ma lakum min ilahin ghayruhu afala tattaqoona

translations.en_sahih: And We had certainly sent Noah to his people, and he said, "O my people, worship Allah; you have no deity other than Him; then will you not fear Him?"
translations.en_yusufali: (Further, We sent a long line of prophets for your instruction). We sent Noah to his people: He said, "O my people! worship Allah! Ye have no other god but Him. Will ye not fear (Him)?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya, Kami telah mengutuskan Nabi Nuh kepada kaumnya lalu berkatalah ia: "Wahai kaumku, sembahlah kamu akan Allah (sebenarnya) tidak ada Tuhan bagi kamu selain daripadaNya. Oleh itu, tidakkah kamu mahu bertaqwa kepadaNya?".

ayahs.arabic: فَقَالَ ٱلْمَلَؤُا۟ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِن قَوْمِهِۦ مَا هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُكُمْ يُرِيدُ أَن يَتَفَضَّلَ عَلَيْكُمْ وَلَوْ شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ لَأَنزَلَ مَلَـٰٓئِكَةً مَّا سَمِعْنَا بِهَـٰذَا فِىٓ ءَابَآئِنَا ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faqala almalao allatheena kafaroo min qawmihi ma hatha illa basharun mithlukum yureedu an yatafaddala AAalaykum walaw shaa Allahu laanzala malaikatan ma samiAAna bihatha fee abaina alawwaleena

translations.en_sahih: But the eminent among those who disbelieved from his people said, "This is not but a man like yourselves who wishes to take precedence over you; and if Allah had willed [to send a messenger], He would have sent down angels. We have not heard of this among our forefathers.
translations.en_yusufali: The chiefs of the Unbelievers among his people said: "He is no more than a man like yourselves: his wish is to assert his superiority over you: if Allah had wished (to send messengers), He could have sent down angels; never did we hear such a thing (as he says), among our ancestors of old."
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka ketua-ketua yang kafir dari kaumnya berkata (sesama sendiri)): "Orang ini hanyalah seorang manusia seperti kamu, ia bertujuan hendak melebihkan dirinya daripada kamu. Dan kalaulah Allah berkehendak (mengutuskan seorang Rasul) tentulah Ia menurunkan malaikat menjadi RasulNya. Kami tidak pernah mendengar seruan seperti ini dalam kalangan datuk nenek kami yang telah lalu.

ayahs.arabic: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا رَجُلٌۢ بِهِۦ جِنَّةٌ فَتَرَبَّصُوا۟ بِهِۦ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: In huwa illa rajulun bihi jinnatun fatarabbasoo bihi hatta heenin

translations.en_sahih: He is not but a man possessed with madness, so wait concerning him for a time."
translations.en_yusufali: (And some said): "He is only a man possessed: wait (and have patience) with him for a time."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Ia tidak lain hanyalah seorang lelaki yang mengidap penyakit gila. Oleh itu tunggulah akan perubahan keadaannya hingga ke suatu masa".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱنصُرْنِى بِمَا كَذَّبُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala rabbi onsurnee bima kaththabooni

translations.en_sahih: [Noah] said, "My Lord, support me because they have denied me."
translations.en_yusufali: (Noah) said: "O my Lord! help me: for that they accuse me of falsehood!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Nuh berdoa dengan berkata: "Wahai Tuhanku tolonglah daku, kerana mereka mendustakan seruanku".

ayahs.arabic: فَأَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَيْهِ أَنِ ٱصْنَعِ ٱلْفُلْكَ بِأَعْيُنِنَا وَوَحْيِنَا فَإِذَا جَآءَ أَمْرُنَا وَفَارَ ٱلتَّنُّورُ ۙ فَٱسْلُكْ فِيهَا مِن كُلٍّ زَوْجَيْنِ ٱثْنَيْنِ وَأَهْلَكَ إِلَّا مَن سَبَقَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلْقَوْلُ مِنْهُمْ ۖ وَلَا تُخَـٰطِبْنِى فِى ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوٓا۟ ۖ إِنَّهُم مُّغْرَقُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faawhayna ilayhi ani isnaAAi alfulka biaAAyunina wawahyina faitha jaa amruna wafara alttannooru faosluk feeha min kullin zawjayni ithnayni waahlaka illa man sabaqa AAalayhi alqawlu minhum wala tukhatibnee fee allatheena thalamoo innahum mughraqoona

translations.en_sahih: So We inspired to him, "Construct the ship under Our observation, and Our inspiration, and when Our command comes and the oven overflows, put into the ship from each [creature] two mates and your family, except those for whom the decree [of destruction] has proceeded. And do not address Me concerning those who have wronged; indeed, they are to be drowned.
translations.en_yusufali: So We inspired him (with this message): "Construct the Ark within Our sight and under Our guidance: then when comes Our Command, and the fountains of the earth gush forth, take thou on board pairs of every species, male and female, and thy family- except those of them against whom the Word has already gone forth: And address Me not in favour of the wrong-doers; for they shall be drowned (in the Flood).
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu Kami wahyukan kepadanya: "Buatlah bahtera dengan pengawasan serta kawalan Kami, dan dengan panduan wahyu Kami (tentang cara membuatnya); kemudian apabila datang hukum Kami untuk membinasakan mereka, dan air memancut-mancut dari muka bumi (yang menandakan kedatangan taufan), maka masukkanlah ke dalam bahtera itu dua dari tiap-tiap jenis haiwan (jantan dan betina), dan bawalah ahlimu (dan pengikut-pengikutmu) kecuali orang yang telah ditetapkan hukuman azab atasnya di antara mereka (disebabkan kekufurannya); dan janganlah engkau merayu kepadaku untuk menolong kaum yang zalim itu, kerana sesungguhnya mereka akan ditenggelamkan dengan taufan sehingga mati lemas.

ayahs.arabic: فَإِذَا ٱسْتَوَيْتَ أَنتَ وَمَن مَّعَكَ عَلَى ٱلْفُلْكِ فَقُلِ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى نَجَّىٰنَا مِنَ ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faitha istawayta anta waman maAAaka AAala alfulki faquli alhamdu lillahi allathee najjana mina alqawmi alththalimeena

translations.en_sahih: And when you have boarded the ship, you and those with you, then say, 'Praise to Allah who has saved us from the wrongdoing people.'
translations.en_yusufali: And when thou hast embarked on the Ark - thou and those with thee,- say: "Praise be to Allah, Who has saved us from the people who do wrong."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Kemudian apabila engkau dan orang-orang yang bersamamu telah berada di atas bahtera itu maka hendaklah engkau (bersyukur kepada Allah dengan) berkata: ` Segala puji tertentu bagi Allah yang telah menyelamatkan kami daripada orang-orang yang zalim '.

ayahs.arabic: وَقُل رَّبِّ أَنزِلْنِى مُنزَلًا مُّبَارَكًا وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ ٱلْمُنزِلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waqul rabbi anzilnee munzalan mubarakan waanta khayru almunzileena

translations.en_sahih: And say, 'My Lord, let me land at a blessed landing place, and You are the best to accommodate [us].' "
translations.en_yusufali: And say: "O my Lord! enable me to disembark with thy blessing: for Thou art the Best to enable (us) to disembark."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan berdoalah dengan berkata: ` Wahai Tuhanku, turunkanlah daku di tempat turun yang berkat, dan Engkau adalah sebaik-baik Pemberi tempat ' "

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَـٰتٍ وَإِن كُنَّا لَمُبْتَلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thalika laayatin wain kunna lamubtaleena

translations.en_sahih: Indeed in that are signs, and indeed, We are ever testing [Our servants].
translations.en_yusufali: Verily in this there are Signs (for men to understand); (thus) do We try (men).
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya pada yang demikian itu terdapat tanda-tanda (yang mendatangkan iktibar); dan sesungguhnya Kami tetap menguji (hamba-hamba Kami).

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ أَنشَأْنَا مِنۢ بَعْدِهِمْ قَرْنًا ءَاخَرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma anshana min baAAdihim qarnan akhareena

translations.en_sahih: Then We produced after them a generation of others.
translations.en_yusufali: Then We raised after them another generation.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian Kami ciptakan sesudah mereka, umat yang lain.

ayahs.arabic: فَأَرْسَلْنَا فِيهِمْ رَسُولًا مِّنْهُمْ أَنِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِّنْ إِلَـٰهٍ غَيْرُهُۥٓ ۖ أَفَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faarsalna feehim rasoolan minhum ani oAAbudoo Allaha ma lakum min ilahin ghayruhu afala tattaqoona

translations.en_sahih: And We sent among them a messenger from themselves, [saying], "Worship Allah; you have no deity other than Him; then will you not fear Him?"
translations.en_yusufali: And We sent to them a messenger from among themselves, (saying), "Worship Allah! ye have no other god but Him. Will ye not fear (Him)?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu Kami mengutus kepada mereka seorang Rasul dari kalangan mereka (dengan berfirman melalui Rasul itu): "Sembahlah kamu akan Allah, (sebenarnya) tidak ada Tuhan bagi kamu selain daripadaNya. Oleh itu tidakkah kamu mahu bertaqwa kepadaNya?"

ayahs.arabic: وَقَالَ ٱلْمَلَأُ مِن قَوْمِهِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ وَكَذَّبُوا۟ بِلِقَآءِ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ وَأَتْرَفْنَـٰهُمْ فِى ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا مَا هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُكُمْ يَأْكُلُ مِمَّا تَأْكُلُونَ مِنْهُ وَيَشْرَبُ مِمَّا تَشْرَبُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waqala almalao min qawmihi allatheena kafaroo wakaththaboo biliqai alakhirati waatrafnahum fee alhayati alddunya ma hatha illa basharun mithlukum yakulu mimma takuloona minhu wayashrabu mimma tashraboona

translations.en_sahih: And the eminent among his people who disbelieved and denied the meeting of the Hereafter while We had given them luxury in the worldly life said, "This is not but a man like yourselves. He eats of that from which you eat and drinks of what you drink.
translations.en_yusufali: And the chiefs of his people, who disbelieved and denied the Meeting in the Hereafter, and on whom We had bestowed the good things of this life, said: "He is no more than a man like yourselves: he eats of that of which ye eat, and drinks of what ye drink.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (bagi menolak seruan itu), ketua-ketua dari kaumnya yang kafir serta mendustakan pertemuan hari akhirat, dan yang Kami mewahkan mereka dalam kehidupan dunia, berkata (sesama sendiri) "Orang ini hanyalah seorang manusia seperti kamu, ia makan dari apa yang kamu makan, dan meminum dari apa yang kamu minum.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَئِنْ أَطَعْتُم بَشَرًا مِّثْلَكُمْ إِنَّكُمْ إِذًا لَّخَـٰسِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walain ataAAtum basharan mithlakum innakum ithan lakhasiroona

translations.en_sahih: And if you should obey a man like yourselves, indeed, you would then be losers.
translations.en_yusufali: "If ye obey a man like yourselves, behold, it is certain ye will be lost.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan demi sesungguhnya, jika kamu taati manusia yang seperti kamu, tentulah kamu dengan membuat demikian, menjadi orang-orang yang rugi.

ayahs.arabic: أَيَعِدُكُمْ أَنَّكُمْ إِذَا مِتُّمْ وَكُنتُمْ تُرَابًا وَعِظَـٰمًا أَنَّكُم مُّخْرَجُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: AyaAAidukum annakum itha mittum wakuntum turaban waAAithaman annakum mukhrajoona

translations.en_sahih: Does he promise you that when you have died and become dust and bones that you will be brought forth [once more]?
translations.en_yusufali: "Does he promise that when ye die and become dust and bones, ye shall be brought forth (again)?
translations.ms_basmeih: "Patutkah ia menjanjikan kamu, bahawa sesungguhnya apabila kamu mati dan menjadi tanah dan tulang, kamu akan dikeluarkan (dari kubur hidup semula)?

ayahs.arabic: ۞ هَيْهَاتَ هَيْهَاتَ لِمَا تُوعَدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Hayhata hayhata lima tooAAadoona

translations.en_sahih: How far, how far, is that which you are promised.
translations.en_yusufali: "Far, very far is that which ye are promised!
translations.ms_basmeih: "Jauh, amatlah jauh (dari kebenaran) apa yang dijanjikan kepada kamu itu!

ayahs.arabic: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّا حَيَاتُنَا ٱلدُّنْيَا نَمُوتُ وَنَحْيَا وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَبْعُوثِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: In hiya illa hayatuna alddunya namootu wanahya wama nahnu bimabAAootheena

translations.en_sahih: Life is not but our worldly life - we die and live, but we will not be resurrected.
translations.en_yusufali: "There is nothing but our life in this world! We shall die and we live! But we shall never be raised up again!
translations.ms_basmeih: "Tiadalah hidup yang lain selain dari hidup kita di dunia ini. Kita mati dan kita hidup (silih berganti) dan tiadalah kita akan dibangkitkan hidup semula.

ayahs.arabic: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا رَجُلٌ ٱفْتَرَىٰ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًا وَمَا نَحْنُ لَهُۥ بِمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: In huwa illa rajulun iftara AAala Allahi kathiban wama nahnu lahu bimumineena

translations.en_sahih: He is not but a man who has invented a lie about Allah, and we will not believe him."
translations.en_yusufali: "He is only a man who invents a lie against Allah, but we are not the ones to believe in him!"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Tiadalah dia (Nabi Hud) itu selain dari seorang lelaki yang mengada-adakan perkara dusta terhadap Allah, dan kami tidak akan beriman kepadanya".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱنصُرْنِى بِمَا كَذَّبُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala rabbi onsurnee bima kaththabooni

translations.en_sahih: He said, "My Lord, support me because they have denied me."
translations.en_yusufali: (The prophet) said: "O my Lord! help me: for that they accuse me of falsehood."
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Hud berdoa dengan berkata: "Wahai TuhanKu, belalah daku, kerana mereka telah mendustakan seruanku".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ عَمَّا قَلِيلٍ لَّيُصْبِحُنَّ نَـٰدِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala AAamma qaleelin layusbihunna nadimeena

translations.en_sahih: [Allah] said, "After a little, they will surely become regretful."
translations.en_yusufali: (Allah) said: "In but a little while, they are sure to be sorry!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Allah berfirman: "Dalam sedikit masa lagi mereka akan menjadi orang-orang yang menyesal".

ayahs.arabic: فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلصَّيْحَةُ بِٱلْحَقِّ فَجَعَلْنَـٰهُمْ غُثَآءً ۚ فَبُعْدًا لِّلْقَوْمِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faakhathathumu alssayhatu bialhaqqi fajaAAalnahum ghuthaan fabuAAdan lilqawmi alththalimeena

translations.en_sahih: So the shriek seized them in truth, and We made them as [plant] stubble. Then away with the wrongdoing people.
translations.en_yusufali: Then the Blast overtook them with justice, and We made them as rubbish of dead leaves (floating on the stream of Time)! So away with the people who do wrong!
translations.ms_basmeih: Akhirnya mereka dibinasakan oleh letusan suara yang menggempakan bumi, dengan benar lagi adil, lalu Kami jadikan mereka sebagai sampah sarap (yang dihanyutkan oleh banjir). Maka kebinasaanlah kesudahannya bagi kaum yang zalim itu.

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ أَنشَأْنَا مِنۢ بَعْدِهِمْ قُرُونًا ءَاخَرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma anshana min baAAdihim quroonan akhareena

translations.en_sahih: Then We produced after them other generations.
translations.en_yusufali: Then We raised after them other generations.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian Kami ciptakan, sesudah mereka, umat-umat yang lain.

ayahs.arabic: مَا تَسْبِقُ مِنْ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلَهَا وَمَا يَسْتَـْٔخِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ma tasbiqu min ommatin ajalaha wama yastakhiroona

translations.en_sahih: No nation will precede its time [of termination], nor will they remain [thereafter].
translations.en_yusufali: No people can hasten their term, nor can they delay (it).
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesuatu umat itu tidak dapat mendahului tempohnya yang telah ditentukan, dan mereka pula tidak dapat melambatkannya.

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ أَرْسَلْنَا رُسُلَنَا تَتْرَا ۖ كُلَّ مَا جَآءَ أُمَّةً رَّسُولُهَا كَذَّبُوهُ ۚ فَأَتْبَعْنَا بَعْضَهُم بَعْضًا وَجَعَلْنَـٰهُمْ أَحَادِيثَ ۚ فَبُعْدًا لِّقَوْمٍ لَّا يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma arsalna rusulana tatra kulla ma jaa ommatan rasooluha kaththaboohu faatbaAAna baAAdahum baAAdan wajaAAalnahum ahadeetha fabuAAdan liqawmin la yuminoona

translations.en_sahih: Then We sent Our messengers in succession. Every time there came to a nation its messenger, they denied him, so We made them follow one another [to destruction], and We made them narrations. So away with a people who do not believe.
translations.en_yusufali: Then sent We our messengers in succession: every time there came to a people their messenger, they accused him of falsehood: so We made them follow each other (in punishment): We made them as a tale (that is told): So away with a people that will not believe!
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian Kami mengutus Rasul-rasul Kami silih berganti. Tiap-tiap kali sesuatu umat didatangi Rasulnya, mereka mendustakannya; lalu Kami binasakan umat-umat yang demikian, lepas satu-satu; dan Kami jadikan perihal mereka sebagai cerita-cerita (yang mendatangkan iktibar); maka kebinasaanlah kesudahannya bagi orang-orang yang tidak beriman.

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ أَرْسَلْنَا مُوسَىٰ وَأَخَاهُ هَـٰرُونَ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا وَسُلْطَـٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma arsalna moosa waakhahu haroona biayatina wasultanin mubeenin

translations.en_sahih: Then We sent Moses and his brother Aaron with Our signs and a clear authority
translations.en_yusufali: Then We sent Moses and his brother Aaron, with Our Signs and authority manifest,
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian Kami mengutus Nabi Musa dan saudaranya: Nabi Harun, dengan membawa ayat-ayat keterangan Kami, dan bukti (mukjizat) yang nyata,

ayahs.arabic: إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ وَمَلَإِي۟هِۦ فَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ وَكَانُوا۟ قَوْمًا عَالِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ila firAAawna wamalaihi faistakbaroo wakanoo qawman AAaleena

translations.en_sahih: To Pharaoh and his establishment, but they were arrogant and were a haughty people.
translations.en_yusufali: To Pharaoh and his Chiefs: But these behaved insolently: they were an arrogant people.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kepada Firaun dan kaumnya; lalu mereka menentang (seruan Nabi-nabi Allah itu) dengan sombong takbur, serta menjadi kaum yang membesarkan diri.

ayahs.arabic: فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَنُؤْمِنُ لِبَشَرَيْنِ مِثْلِنَا وَقَوْمُهُمَا لَنَا عَـٰبِدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faqaloo anuminu libasharayni mithlina waqawmuhuma lana AAabidoona

translations.en_sahih: They said, "Should we believe two men like ourselves while their people are for us in servitude?"
translations.en_yusufali: They said: "Shall we believe in two men like ourselves? And their people are subject to us!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Sehingga mereka berkata (dengan angkuhnya): "Patutkah kita beriman kepada dua manusia seperti kita, sedang kaum mereka menjadi orang-orang suruhan kita?"

ayahs.arabic: فَكَذَّبُوهُمَا فَكَانُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلْمُهْلَكِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fakaththaboohuma fakanoo mina almuhlakeena

translations.en_sahih: So they denied them and were of those destroyed.
translations.en_yusufali: So they accused them of falsehood, and they became of those who were destroyed.
translations.ms_basmeih: Oleh itu, merekapun mendustakan keduanya, lalu menjadilah mereka sebahagian dari orang-orang yang dibinasakan.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَا مُوسَى ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَهْتَدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad atayna moosa alkitaba laAAallahum yahtadoona

translations.en_sahih: And We certainly gave Moses the Scripture that perhaps they would be guided.
translations.en_yusufali: And We gave Moses the Book, in order that they might receive guidance.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya, Kami telah memberikan Nabi Musa Kitab Taurat, supaya mereka beroleh hidayah petunjuk.

ayahs.arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا ٱبْنَ مَرْيَمَ وَأُمَّهُۥٓ ءَايَةً وَءَاوَيْنَـٰهُمَآ إِلَىٰ رَبْوَةٍ ذَاتِ قَرَارٍ وَمَعِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: WajaAAalna ibna maryama waommahu ayatan waawaynahuma ila rabwatin thati qararin wamaAAeenin

translations.en_sahih: And We made the son of Mary and his mother a sign and sheltered them within a high ground having level [areas] and flowing water.
translations.en_yusufali: And We made the son of Mary and his mother as a Sign: We gave them both shelter on high ground, affording rest and security and furnished with springs.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami jadikan (Nabi lsa) ibni Maryam serta ibunya sebagai satu tanda (mukjizat) dan Kami telah menempatkan keduanya di tanah tinggi, tempat tinggal yang ada tanaman dan mata air yang mengalir.

ayahs.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلرُّسُلُ كُلُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلطَّيِّبَـٰتِ وَٱعْمَلُوا۟ صَـٰلِحًا ۖ إِنِّى بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ عَلِيمٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Ya ayyuha alrrusulu kuloo mina alttayyibati waiAAmaloo salihan innee bima taAAmaloona AAaleemun

translations.en_sahih: [Allah said], "O messengers, eat from the good foods and work righteousness. Indeed, I, of what you do, am Knowing.
translations.en_yusufali: O ye messengers! enjoy (all) things good and pure, and work righteousness: for I am well-acquainted with (all) that ye do.
translations.ms_basmeih: Wahai Rasul-rasul, makanlah dari benda-benda yang baik lagi halal dan kerjakanlah amal-amal soleh; sesungguhnya Aku Maha Mengetahui akan apa yang kamu kerjakan.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنَّ هَـٰذِهِۦٓ أُمَّتُكُمْ أُمَّةً وَٰحِدَةً وَأَنَا۠ رَبُّكُمْ فَٱتَّقُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Wainna hathihi ommatukum ommatan wahidatan waana rabbukum faittaqooni

translations.en_sahih: And indeed this, your religion, is one religion, and I am your Lord, so fear Me."
translations.en_yusufali: And verily this Brotherhood of yours is a single Brotherhood, and I am your Lord and Cherisher: therefore fear Me (and no other).
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya ugama Islam ini ialah ugama kamu - ugama yang satu asas pokoknya, dan Akulah Tuhan kamu; maka bertaqwalah kamu kepadaKu.

ayahs.arabic: فَتَقَطَّعُوٓا۟ أَمْرَهُم بَيْنَهُمْ زُبُرًا ۖ كُلُّ حِزْبٍۭ بِمَا لَدَيْهِمْ فَرِحُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: FataqattaAAoo amrahum baynahum zuburan kullu hizbin bima ladayhim farihoona

translations.en_sahih: But the people divided their religion among them into sects - each faction, in what it has, rejoicing.
translations.en_yusufali: But people have cut off their affair (of unity), between them, into sects: each party rejoices in that which is with itself.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian umat Rasul-rasul itu berpecah-belah dalam urusan ugama mereka kepada beberapa pecahan, tiap-tiap golongan bergembira dengan apa yang ada pada mereka.

ayahs.arabic: فَذَرْهُمْ فِى غَمْرَتِهِمْ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Fatharhum fee ghamratihim hatta heenin

translations.en_sahih: So leave them in their confusion for a time.
translations.en_yusufali: But leave them in their confused ignorance for a time.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka biarkanlah mereka tenggelam dalam kesesatannya itu hingga ke suatu masa.

ayahs.arabic: أَيَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّمَا نُمِدُّهُم بِهِۦ مِن مَّالٍ وَبَنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ayahsaboona annama numidduhum bihi min malin wabaneena

translations.en_sahih: Do they think that what We extend to them of wealth and children
translations.en_yusufali: Do they think that because We have granted them abundance of wealth and sons,
translations.ms_basmeih: Adakah mereka menyangka bahawa apa yang Kami berikan kepada mereka dari harta benda dan anak-pinak itu.

ayahs.arabic: نُسَارِعُ لَهُمْ فِى ٱلْخَيْرَٰتِ ۚ بَل لَّا يَشْعُرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: NusariAAu lahum fee alkhayrati bal la yashAAuroona

translations.en_sahih: Is [because] We hasten for them good things? Rather, they do not perceive.
translations.en_yusufali: We would hasten them on in every good? Nay, they do not understand.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Bermakna bahawa dengan yang demikian) Kami menyegerakan untuk mereka pemberian kebaikan? (Tidak!) Bahkan mereka tidak menyedari (hakikatnya yang sebenar).

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ هُم مِّنْ خَشْيَةِ رَبِّهِم مُّشْفِقُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna allatheena hum min khashyati rabbihim mushfiqoona

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, they who are apprehensive from fear of their Lord
translations.en_yusufali: Verily those who live in awe for fear of their Lord;
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang sentiasa bimbang disebabkan takut kepada (kemurkaan) Tuhan mereka;

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم بِـَٔايَـٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waallatheena hum biayati rabbihim yuminoona

translations.en_sahih: And they who believe in the signs of their Lord
translations.en_yusufali: Those who believe in the Signs of their Lord;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan orang-orang yang beriman kepada ayat-ayat Tuhan mereka;

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم بِرَبِّهِمْ لَا يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waallatheena hum birabbihim la yushrikoona

translations.en_sahih: And they who do not associate anything with their Lord
translations.en_yusufali: Those who join not (in worship) partners with their Lord;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan orang-orang yang tidak mempersekutukan sesuatu yang lain dengan Tuhan mereka;

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يُؤْتُونَ مَآ ءَاتَوا۟ وَّقُلُوبُهُمْ وَجِلَةٌ أَنَّهُمْ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ رَٰجِعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waallatheena yutoona ma ataw waquloobuhum wajilatun annahum ila rabbihim rajiAAoona

translations.en_sahih: And they who give what they give while their hearts are fearful because they will be returning to their Lord -
translations.en_yusufali: And those who dispense their charity with their hearts full of fear, because they will return to their Lord;-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan orang-orang yang memberi apa yang mereka berikan sedang hati mereka gementar kerana mereka yakin akan kembali kepada Tuhan mereka;

ayahs.arabic: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ يُسَـٰرِعُونَ فِى ٱلْخَيْرَٰتِ وَهُمْ لَهَا سَـٰبِقُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Olaika yusariAAoona fee alkhayrati wahum laha sabiqoona

translations.en_sahih: It is those who hasten to good deeds, and they outstrip [others] therein.
translations.en_yusufali: It is these who hasten in every good work, and these who are foremost in them.
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka itulah orang-orang yang segera mengerjakan kebaikan, dan merekalah orang-orang yang mendahului pada mencapainya.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَا نُكَلِّفُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَا ۖ وَلَدَيْنَا كِتَـٰبٌ يَنطِقُ بِٱلْحَقِّ ۚ وَهُمْ لَا يُظْلَمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wala nukallifu nafsan illa wusAAaha waladayna kitabun yantiqu bialhaqqi wahum la yuthlamoona

translations.en_sahih: And We charge no soul except [with that within] its capacity, and with Us is a record which speaks with truth; and they will not be wronged.
translations.en_yusufali: On no soul do We place a burden greater than it can bear: before Us is a record which clearly shows the truth: they will never be wronged.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami tidak memberati seseorang melainkan apa yang terdaya olehnya; dan di sisi Kami ada sebuah Kitab (suratan amal) yang menyatakan segala-galanya dengan benar, sedang mereka tidak dianiaya.

ayahs.arabic: بَلْ قُلُوبُهُمْ فِى غَمْرَةٍ مِّنْ هَـٰذَا وَلَهُمْ أَعْمَـٰلٌ مِّن دُونِ ذَٰلِكَ هُمْ لَهَا عَـٰمِلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Bal quloobuhum fee ghamratin min hatha walahum aAAmalun min dooni thalika hum laha AAamiloona

translations.en_sahih: But their hearts are covered with confusion over this, and they have [evil] deeds besides disbelief which they are doing,
translations.en_yusufali: But their hearts are in confused ignorance of this; and there are, besides that, deeds of theirs, which they will (continue) to do,-
translations.ms_basmeih: (Sekalipun demikian, orang-orang yang ingkar tidak juga berfikir) bahkan hati mereka tenggelam di dalam kejahilan, lalai daripada (memahami ajaran Al-Quran) ini; dan mereka pula mempunyai lagi amal-amal (yang jahat) selain dari itu, yang mereka terus-menerus mengerjakannya;

ayahs.arabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَآ أَخَذْنَا مُتْرَفِيهِم بِٱلْعَذَابِ إِذَا هُمْ يَجْـَٔرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Hatta itha akhathna mutrafeehim bialAAathabi itha hum yajaroona

translations.en_sahih: Until when We seize their affluent ones with punishment, at once they are crying [to Allah] for help.
translations.en_yusufali: Until, when We seize in Punishment those of them who received the good things of this world, behold, they will groan in supplication!
translations.ms_basmeih: Hingga apabila Kami timpakan azab kepada orang-orang yang mewah di antara mereka maka dengan serta-merta mereka menjerit-jerit meminta tolong.

ayahs.arabic: لَا تَجْـَٔرُوا۟ ٱلْيَوْمَ ۖ إِنَّكُم مِّنَّا لَا تُنصَرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: La tajaroo alyawma innakum minna la tunsaroona

translations.en_sahih: Do not cry out today. Indeed, by Us you will not be helped.
translations.en_yusufali: (It will be said): "Groan not in supplication this day: for ye shall certainly not be helped by Us.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Lalu dikatakan kepada mereka): "Janganlah kamu menjerit-jerit meminta tolong pada hari ini, sesungguhnya kamu tidak akan beroleh sebarang pertolongan dari Kami.

ayahs.arabic: قَدْ كَانَتْ ءَايَـٰتِى تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْكُمْ فَكُنتُمْ عَلَىٰٓ أَعْقَـٰبِكُمْ تَنكِصُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qad kanat ayatee tutla AAalaykum fakuntum AAala aAAqabikum tankisoona

translations.en_sahih: My verses had already been recited to you, but you were turning back on your heels
translations.en_yusufali: "My Signs used to be rehearsed to you, but ye used to turn back on your heels-
translations.ms_basmeih: "(Kerana) sesungguhnya ayat-ayatKu telah berkali-kali dibacakan kepada kamu, dalam pada itu kamu berpaling undur ke belakang -

ayahs.arabic: مُسْتَكْبِرِينَ بِهِۦ سَـٰمِرًا تَهْجُرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Mustakbireena bihi samiran tahjuroona

translations.en_sahih: In arrogance regarding it, conversing by night, speaking evil.
translations.en_yusufali: "In arrogance: talking nonsense about the (Qur'an), like one telling fables by night."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dengan keadaan sombong angkuh mendustakannya, serta mencacinya dalam perbualan kamu pada malam hari".

ayahs.arabic: أَفَلَمْ يَدَّبَّرُوا۟ ٱلْقَوْلَ أَمْ جَآءَهُم مَّا لَمْ يَأْتِ ءَابَآءَهُمُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Afalam yaddabbaroo alqawla am jaahum ma lam yati abaahumu alawwaleena

translations.en_sahih: Then have they not reflected over the Qur'an, or has there come to them that which had not come to their forefathers?
translations.en_yusufali: Do they not ponder over the Word (of Allah), or has anything (new) come to them that did not come to their fathers of old?
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka adakah mereka melakukan yang demikian kerana mereka tidak dapat memahami kata-kata ajaran (yang disampaikan kepada mereka)? Atau kerana telah datang kepada mereka sesuatu yang tidak pernah datang kepada datuk nenek mereka yang telah lalu?

ayahs.arabic: أَمْ لَمْ يَعْرِفُوا۟ رَسُولَهُمْ فَهُمْ لَهُۥ مُنكِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Am lam yaAArifoo rasoolahum fahum lahu munkiroona

translations.en_sahih: Or did they not know their Messenger, so they are toward him disacknowledging?
translations.en_yusufali: Or do they not recognise their Messenger, that they deny him?
translations.ms_basmeih: Atau kerana mereka tidak kenal rasul mereka, lalu mereka mengingkarinya?

ayahs.arabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ بِهِۦ جِنَّةٌۢ ۚ بَلْ جَآءَهُم بِٱلْحَقِّ وَأَكْثَرُهُمْ لِلْحَقِّ كَـٰرِهُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Am yaqooloona bihi jinnatun bal jaahum bialhaqqi waaktharuhum lilhaqqi karihoona

translations.en_sahih: Or do they say, "In him is madness?" Rather, he brought them the truth, but most of them, to the truth, are averse.
translations.en_yusufali: Or do they say, "He is possessed"? Nay, he has brought them the Truth, but most of them hate the Truth.
translations.ms_basmeih: Atau kerana mereka mengatakan: "Dia kena penyakit gila?" (Sebenarnya bukan kerana sesuatu pun dari yang tersebut itu) bahkan kerana Rasul mereka datang kepada mereka membawa ugama yang tetap benar, dan tabiat kebanyakan mereka tidak suka kepada sebarang kebenaran.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَوِ ٱتَّبَعَ ٱلْحَقُّ أَهْوَآءَهُمْ لَفَسَدَتِ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتُ وَٱلْأَرْضُ وَمَن فِيهِنَّ ۚ بَلْ أَتَيْنَـٰهُم بِذِكْرِهِمْ فَهُمْ عَن ذِكْرِهِم مُّعْرِضُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walawi ittabaAAa alhaqqu ahwaahum lafasadati alssamawatu waalardu waman feehinna bal ataynahum bithikrihim fahum AAan thikrihim muAAridoona

translations.en_sahih: But if the Truth had followed their inclinations, the heavens and the earth and whoever is in them would have been ruined. Rather, We have brought them their message, but they, from their message, are turning away.
translations.en_yusufali: If the Truth had been in accord with their desires, truly the heavens and the earth, and all beings therein would have been in confusion and corruption! Nay, We have sent them their admonition, but they turn away from their admonition.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan kalaulah kebenaran itu tunduk menurut hawa nafsu mereka, nescaya rosak binasalah langit dan bumi serta segala yang adanya. (Bukan sahaja Kami memberikan ugama yang tetap benar) bahkan Kami memberi kepada mereka Al-Quran yang menjadi sebutan baik dan mendatangkan kemuliaan kepada mereka; maka Al-Quran yang demikian keadaannya, mereka tidak juga mahu menerimanya;

ayahs.arabic: أَمْ تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ خَرْجًا فَخَرَاجُ رَبِّكَ خَيْرٌ ۖ وَهُوَ خَيْرُ ٱلرَّٰزِقِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Am tasaluhum kharjan fakharaju rabbika khayrun wahuwa khayru alrraziqeena

translations.en_sahih: Or do you, [O Muhammad], ask them for payment? But the reward of your Lord is best, and He is the best of providers.
translations.en_yusufali: Or is it that thou askest them for some recompense? But the recompense of thy Lord is best: He is the Best of those who give sustenance.
translations.ms_basmeih: Atau adakah (mereka menolak seruanmu itu kerana) engkau meminta kepada mereka suatu pemberian (sebagai hasil pendapatan seruanmu)? (Ini pun tidak!) Kerana engkau percaya pemberian Tuhanmu lebih baik, dan Dia lah jua sebaik-baik Pemberi rezeki.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنَّكَ لَتَدْعُوهُمْ إِلَىٰ صِرَٰطٍ مُّسْتَقِيمٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Wainnaka latadAAoohum ila siratin mustaqeemin

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, you invite them to a straight path.
translations.en_yusufali: But verily thou callest them to the Straight Way;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya engkau (wahai Muhammad) hanya menyeru mereka ke jalan yang lurus;

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ عَنِ ٱلصِّرَٰطِ لَنَـٰكِبُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wainna allatheena la yuminoona bialakhirati AAani alssirati lanakiboona

translations.en_sahih: But indeed, those who do not believe in the Hereafter are deviating from the path.
translations.en_yusufali: And verily those who believe not in the Hereafter are deviating from that Way.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya orang-orang yang tidak beriman kepada hari akhirat, sudah tentu tidak mengikuti jalan yang lurus itu.

ayahs.arabic: ۞ وَلَوْ رَحِمْنَـٰهُمْ وَكَشَفْنَا مَا بِهِم مِّن ضُرٍّ لَّلَجُّوا۟ فِى طُغْيَـٰنِهِمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaw rahimnahum wakashafna ma bihim min durrin lalajjoo fee tughyanihim yaAAmahoona

translations.en_sahih: And even if We gave them mercy and removed what was upon them of affliction, they would persist in their transgression, wandering blindly.
translations.en_yusufali: If We had mercy on them and removed the distress which is on them, they would obstinately persist in their transgression, wandering in distraction to and fro.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sekiranya Kami menaruh belas kasihan kepada mereka serta Kami hapuskan kesusahan yang menimpa mereka, nescaya mereka akan tetap terus meraba-raba dalam kesesatan mereka yang melampaui batas itu.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَخَذْنَـٰهُم بِٱلْعَذَابِ فَمَا ٱسْتَكَانُوا۟ لِرَبِّهِمْ وَمَا يَتَضَرَّعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad akhathnahum bialAAathabi fama istakanoo lirabbihim wama yatadarraAAoona

translations.en_sahih: And We had gripped them with suffering [as a warning], but they did not yield to their Lord, nor did they humbly supplicate, [and will continue thus]
translations.en_yusufali: We inflicted Punishment on them, but they humbled not themselves to their Lord, nor do they submissively entreat (Him)!-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Kami telah menimpakan mereka dengan azab (di dunia), maka mereka tidak juga tunduk patuh kepada Tuhan mereka dan tidak pula berdoa kepadaNya dengan merendah diri (serta insaf dan bertaubat);

ayahs.arabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا فَتَحْنَا عَلَيْهِم بَابًا ذَا عَذَابٍ شَدِيدٍ إِذَا هُمْ فِيهِ مُبْلِسُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Hatta itha fatahna AAalayhim baban tha AAathabin shadeedin itha hum feehi mublisoona

translations.en_sahih: Until when We have opened before them a door of severe punishment, immediately they will be therein in despair.
translations.en_yusufali: Until We open on them a gate leading to a severe Punishment: then Lo! they will be plunged in despair therein!
translations.ms_basmeih: Sehingga apabila Kami bukakan kepada mereka sebuah pintu yang menyebabkan azab yang berat, maka mereka serta-merta berputus asa dengan sebabnya - dari mendapat sebarang kebaikan.

ayahs.arabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنشَأَ لَكُمُ ٱلسَّمْعَ وَٱلْأَبْصَـٰرَ وَٱلْأَفْـِٔدَةَ ۚ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wahuwa allathee anshaa lakumu alssamAAa waalabsara waalafidata qaleelan ma tashkuroona

translations.en_sahih: And it is He who produced for you hearing and vision and hearts; little are you grateful.
translations.en_yusufali: It is He Who has created for you (the faculties of) hearing, sight, feeling and understanding: little thanks it is ye give!
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Dia lah jua yang mengadakan bagi kamu pendengaran dan penglihatan serta hati (untuk kamu bersyukur; tetapi) amatlah sedikit kamu bersyukur.

ayahs.arabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى ذَرَأَكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَإِلَيْهِ تُحْشَرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wahuwa allathee tharaakum fee alardi wailayhi tuhsharoona

translations.en_sahih: And it is He who has multiplied you throughout the earth, and to Him you will be gathered.
translations.en_yusufali: And He has multiplied you through the earth, and to Him shall ye be gathered back.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Dia lah yang menciptakan serta mengembangkan kamu di bumi, dan kepadaNyalah kamu akan dihimpunkan.

ayahs.arabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى يُحْىِۦ وَيُمِيتُ وَلَهُ ٱخْتِلَـٰفُ ٱلَّيْلِ وَٱلنَّهَارِ ۚ أَفَلَا تَعْقِلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wahuwa allathee yuhyee wayumeetu walahu ikhtilafu allayli waalnnahari afala taAAqiloona

translations.en_sahih: And it is He who gives life and causes death, and His is the alternation of the night and the day. Then will you not reason?
translations.en_yusufali: It is He Who gives life and death, and to Him (is due) the alternation of Night and Day: will ye not then understand?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Dia lah yang menghidupkan dan mematikan; dan Dia lah yang menentukan pertukaran malam dan siang. Maka tidakkah kamu mahu berfikir?

ayahs.arabic: بَلْ قَالُوا۟ مِثْلَ مَا قَالَ ٱلْأَوَّلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Bal qaloo mithla ma qala alawwaloona

translations.en_sahih: Rather, they say like what the former peoples said.
translations.en_yusufali: On the contrary they say things similar to what the ancients said.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Mereka tidak juga mahu berfikir) bahkan mereka berkata seperti yang dikatakan oleh orang-orang dahulu (yang ingkar);

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ أَءِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظَـٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo aitha mitna wakunna turaban waAAithaman ainna lamabAAoothoona

translations.en_sahih: They said, "When we have died and become dust and bones, are we indeed to be resurrected?
translations.en_yusufali: They say: "What! when we die and become dust and bones, could we really be raised up again?
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka berkata: "Adakah apabila kami telah mati dan kami menjadi tanah dan tulang, adakah kami akan dibangkitkan (hidup semula)?

ayahs.arabic: لَقَدْ وُعِدْنَا نَحْنُ وَءَابَآؤُنَا هَـٰذَا مِن قَبْلُ إِنْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّآ أَسَـٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Laqad wuAAidna nahnu waabaona hatha min qablu in hatha illa asateeru alawwaleena

translations.en_sahih: We have been promised this, we and our forefathers, before; this is not but legends of the former peoples."
translations.en_yusufali: "Such things have been promised to us and to our fathers before! they are nothing but tales of the ancients!"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Demi sesungguhnya, kami telah dijanjikan perkara ini - kami dan datuk nenek kami - dari dahulu lagi; perkara ini hanyalah cerita dongeng orang-orang dahulu-kala."

ayahs.arabic: قُل لِّمَنِ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَمَن فِيهَآ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qul limani alardu waman feeha in kuntum taAAlamoona

translations.en_sahih: Say, [O Muhammad], "To whom belongs the earth and whoever is in it, if you should know?"
translations.en_yusufali: Say: "To whom belong the earth and all beings therein? (say) if ye know!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Tanyakanlah (wahai Muhammad): "Kepunyaan siapakah bumi ini dan segala yang ada padanya, kalau kamu mengetahui?"

ayahs.arabic: سَيَقُولُونَ لِلَّهِ ۚ قُلْ أَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Sayaqooloona lillahi qul afala tathakkaroona

translations.en_sahih: They will say, "To Allah." Say, "Then will you not remember?"
translations.en_yusufali: They will say, "To Allah!" say: "Yet will ye not receive admonition?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka akan menjawab: "Kepunyaan Allah". Katakanlah: "Mengapa kamu tidak mahu ingat (dan insaf)?"

ayahs.arabic: قُلْ مَن رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ ٱلسَّبْعِ وَرَبُّ ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
ayahs.transliteration: Qul man rabbu alssamawati alssabAAi warabbu alAAarshi alAAatheemi

translations.en_sahih: Say, "Who is Lord of the seven heavens and Lord of the Great Throne?"
translations.en_yusufali: Say: "Who is the Lord of the seven heavens, and the Lord of the Throne (of Glory) Supreme?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Tanyakanlah lagi: "Siapakah Tuhan yang memiliki dan mentadbirkan langit yang tujuh, dan Tuhan yang mempunyai Arasy yang besar?"

ayahs.arabic: سَيَقُولُونَ لِلَّهِ ۚ قُلْ أَفَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Sayaqooloona lillahi qul afala tattaqoona

translations.en_sahih: They will say, "[They belong] to Allah." Say, "Then will you not fear Him?"
translations.en_yusufali: They will say, "(They belong) to Allah." Say: "Will ye not then be filled with awe?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka akan menjawab: "(Semuanya) kepunyaan Allah". Katakanlah: "Mengapa kamu tidak mahu bertaqwa?"

ayahs.arabic: قُلْ مَنۢ بِيَدِهِۦ مَلَكُوتُ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ وَهُوَ يُجِيرُ وَلَا يُجَارُ عَلَيْهِ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qul man biyadihi malakootu kulli shayin wahuwa yujeeru wala yujaru AAalayhi in kuntum taAAlamoona

translations.en_sahih: Say, "In whose hand is the realm of all things - and He protects while none can protect against Him - if you should know?"
translations.en_yusufali: Say: "Who is it in whose hands is the governance of all things,- who protects (all), but is not protected (of any)? (say) if ye know."
translations.ms_basmeih: Tanyakanlah lagi: Siapakah yang memegang kuasa pemerintahan tiap-tiap sesuatu, serta ia dapat melindungi (segala-galanya) dan tidak ada sesuatupun yang dapat disembunyi daripada kekuasaannya? (Jawablah) jika kamu mengetahui!"

ayahs.arabic: سَيَقُولُونَ لِلَّهِ ۚ قُلْ فَأَنَّىٰ تُسْحَرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Sayaqooloona lillahi qul faanna tusharoona

translations.en_sahih: They will say, "[All belongs] to Allah." Say, "Then how are you deluded?"
translations.en_yusufali: They will say, "(It belongs) to Allah." Say: "Then how are ye deluded?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka akan menjawab: "(Segala-galanya) dikuasai Allah". Katakanlah: "Jika demikian, bagaimana kamu tertarik hati kepada perkara yang tidak benar?"

ayahs.arabic: بَلْ أَتَيْنَـٰهُم بِٱلْحَقِّ وَإِنَّهُمْ لَكَـٰذِبُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Bal ataynahum bialhaqqi wainnahum lakathiboona

translations.en_sahih: Rather, We have brought them the truth, and indeed they are liars.
translations.en_yusufali: We have sent them the Truth: but they indeed practise falsehood!
translations.ms_basmeih: (Bukanlah sebagaimana tuduhan mereka) bahkan Kami telah membawa kepada mereka keterangan yang benar, dan sesungguhnya mereka adalah berdusta.

ayahs.arabic: مَا ٱتَّخَذَ ٱللَّهُ مِن وَلَدٍ وَمَا كَانَ مَعَهُۥ مِنْ إِلَـٰهٍ ۚ إِذًا لَّذَهَبَ كُلُّ إِلَـٰهٍۭ بِمَا خَلَقَ وَلَعَلَا بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ ۚ سُبْحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ma ittakhatha Allahu min waladin wama kana maAAahu min ilahin ithan lathahaba kullu ilahin bima khalaqa walaAAala baAAduhum AAala baAAdin subhana Allahi AAamma yasifoona

translations.en_sahih: Allah has not taken any son, nor has there ever been with Him any deity. [If there had been], then each deity would have taken what it created, and some of them would have sought to overcome others. Exalted is Allah above what they describe [concerning Him].
translations.en_yusufali: No son did Allah beget, nor is there any god along with Him: (if there were many gods), behold, each god would have taken away what he had created, and some would have lorded it over others! Glory to Allah! (He is free) from the (sort of) things they attribute to Him!
translations.ms_basmeih: Allah tidak sekali-kali mempunyai anak, dan tidak ada sama sekali sebarang tuhan bersamaNya; (kalaulah ada banyak tuhan) tentulah tiap-tiap tuhan itu akan menguasai dan menguruskan segala yang diciptakannya dengan bersendirian, dan tentulah setengahnya akan bertindak mengalahkan setengahnya yang lain. Maha Suci Allah dari apa yang dikatakan oleh mereka (yang musyrik) itu.

ayahs.arabic: عَـٰلِمِ ٱلْغَيْبِ وَٱلشَّهَـٰدَةِ فَتَعَـٰلَىٰ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: AAalimi alghaybi waalshshahadati fataAAala AAamma yushrikoona

translations.en_sahih: [He is] Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, so high is He above what they associate [with Him].
translations.en_yusufali: He knows what is hidden and what is open: too high is He for the partners they attribute to Him!
translations.ms_basmeih: (Allah) Yang mengetahui segala yang tersembunyi dan yang nyata; maka (dengan yang demikian) Maha Tinggilah keadaanNya dari segala yang mereka sekutukan.

ayahs.arabic: قُل رَّبِّ إِمَّا تُرِيَنِّى مَا يُوعَدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qul rabbi imma turiyannee ma yooAAadoona

translations.en_sahih: Say, [O Muhammad], "My Lord, if You should show me that which they are promised,
translations.en_yusufali: Say: "O my Lord! if Thou wilt show me (in my lifetime) that which they are warned against,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Katakanlah (wahai Muhammad): "Wahai Tuhanku, kiranya Engkau hendak memperlihatkan kepadaku (azab) yang dijanjikan kepada mereka (di dunia), -

ayahs.arabic: رَبِّ فَلَا تَجْعَلْنِى فِى ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Rabbi fala tajAAalnee fee alqawmi alththalimeena

translations.en_sahih: My Lord, then do not place me among the wrongdoing people."
translations.en_yusufali: "Then, O my Lord! put me not amongst the people who do wrong!"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Maka wahai Tuhanku, janganlah Engkau biarkan daku tinggal dalam kalangan kaum yang zalim itu".

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنَّا عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّرِيَكَ مَا نَعِدُهُمْ لَقَـٰدِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wainna AAala an nuriyaka ma naAAiduhum laqadiroona

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, We are able to show you what We have promised them.
translations.en_yusufali: And We are certainly able to show thee (in fulfilment) that against which they are warned.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Kami berkuasa memperlihatkan kepadamu azab yang Kami janjikan kepada mereka.

ayahs.arabic: ٱدْفَعْ بِٱلَّتِى هِىَ أَحْسَنُ ٱلسَّيِّئَةَ ۚ نَحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَصِفُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: IdfaAA biallatee hiya ahsanu alssayyiata nahnu aAAlamu bima yasifoona

translations.en_sahih: Repel, by [means of] what is best, [their] evil. We are most knowing of what they describe.
translations.en_yusufali: Repel evil with that which is best: We are well acquainted with the things they say.
translations.ms_basmeih: Tolaklah kejahatan yang dilakukan kepadamu dengan cara yang sebaik-baiknya, Kami Maha Mengetahui apa yang mereka katakan itu.

ayahs.arabic: وَقُل رَّبِّ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ هَمَزَٰتِ ٱلشَّيَـٰطِينِ
ayahs.transliteration: Waqul rabbi aAAoothu bika min hamazati alshshayateeni

translations.en_sahih: And say, "My Lord, I seek refuge in You from the incitements of the devils,
translations.en_yusufali: And say "O my Lord! I seek refuge with Thee from the suggestions of the Evil Ones.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan katakanlah: "Wahai Tuhanku, aku berlindung kepadaMu dari hasutan Syaitan-syaitan

ayahs.arabic: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ رَبِّ أَن يَحْضُرُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: WaaAAoothu bika rabbi an yahdurooni

translations.en_sahih: And I seek refuge in You, my Lord, lest they be present with me."
translations.en_yusufali: "And I seek refuge with Thee O my Lord! lest they should come near me."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan aku berlindung kepadaMu, wahai Tuhanku, supaya Syaitan-syaitan itu tidak menghampiriku".

ayahs.arabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءَ أَحَدَهُمُ ٱلْمَوْتُ قَالَ رَبِّ ٱرْجِعُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Hatta itha jaa ahadahumu almawtu qala rabbi irjiAAooni

translations.en_sahih: [For such is the state of the disbelievers], until, when death comes to one of them, he says, "My Lord, send me back
translations.en_yusufali: (In Falsehood will they be) Until, when death comes to one of them, he says: "O my Lord! send me back (to life),-
translations.ms_basmeih: Kesudahan golongan yang kufur ingkar itu apabila sampai ajal maut kepada salah seorang di antara mereka, berkatalah ia: "Wahai Tuhanku, kembalikanlah daku (hidup semula di dunia) -

ayahs.arabic: لَعَلِّىٓ أَعْمَلُ صَـٰلِحًا فِيمَا تَرَكْتُ ۚ كَلَّآ ۚ إِنَّهَا كَلِمَةٌ هُوَ قَآئِلُهَا ۖ وَمِن وَرَآئِهِم بَرْزَخٌ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: LaAAallee aAAmalu salihan feema taraktu kalla innaha kalimatun huwa qailuha wamin waraihim barzakhun ila yawmi yubAAathoona

translations.en_sahih: That I might do righteousness in that which I left behind." No! It is only a word he is saying; and behind them is a barrier until the Day they are resurrected.
translations.en_yusufali: "In order that I may work righteousness in the things I neglected." - "By no means! It is but a word he says."- Before them is a Partition till the Day they are raised up.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Supaya aku mengerjakan amal-amal yang soleh dalam perkara-perkara yang telah aku tinggalkan". Tidak! Masakan dapat? Sesungguhnya perkataannya itu hanyalah kata-kata yang ia sahaja yang mengatakannya, sedang di hadapan mereka ada alam barzakh (yang mereka tinggal tetap padanya) hingga hari mereka dibangkitkan semula (pada hari kiamat).

ayahs.arabic: فَإِذَا نُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَلَآ أَنسَابَ بَيْنَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ وَلَا يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faitha nufikha fee alssoori fala ansaba baynahum yawmaithin wala yatasaaloona

translations.en_sahih: So when the Horn is blown, no relationship will there be among them that Day, nor will they ask about one another.
translations.en_yusufali: Then when the Trumpet is blown, there will be no more relationships between them that Day, nor will one ask after another!
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian, apabila ditiup sangkakala, maka pada hari itu tidak ada lagi manfaat pertalian kerabat di antara mereka, dan tidak pula sempat mereka bertanya-tanyaan.

ayahs.arabic: فَمَن ثَقُلَتْ مَوَٰزِينُهُۥ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْمُفْلِحُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faman thaqulat mawazeenuhu faolaika humu almuflihoona

translations.en_sahih: And those whose scales are heavy [with good deeds] - it is they who are the successful.
translations.en_yusufali: Then those whose balance (of good deeds) is heavy,- they will attain salvation:
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka sesiapa yang berat timbangan amal baiknya, maka mereka itulah orang-orang yang berjaya.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَنْ خَفَّتْ مَوَٰزِينُهُۥ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ خَسِرُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُمْ فِى جَهَنَّمَ خَـٰلِدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waman khaffat mawazeenuhu faolaika allatheena khasiroo anfusahum fee jahannama khalidoona

translations.en_sahih: But those whose scales are light - those are the ones who have lost their souls, [being] in Hell, abiding eternally.
translations.en_yusufali: But those whose balance is light, will be those who have lost their souls, in Hell will they abide.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesiapa yang ringan timbangan amal baiknya, maka merekalah orang-orang yang merugikan dirinya sendiri; mereka kekal di dalam neraka Jahannam -

ayahs.arabic: تَلْفَحُ وُجُوهَهُمُ ٱلنَّارُ وَهُمْ فِيهَا كَـٰلِحُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Talfahu wujoohahumu alnnaru wahum feeha kalihoona

translations.en_sahih: The Fire will sear their faces, and they therein will have taut smiles.
translations.en_yusufali: The Fire will burn their faces, and they will therein grin, with their lips displaced.
translations.ms_basmeih: Api neraka itu membakar muka mereka, dan tinggalah mereka di situ dengan muka yang hodoh cacat.

ayahs.arabic: أَلَمْ تَكُنْ ءَايَـٰتِى تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْكُمْ فَكُنتُم بِهَا تُكَذِّبُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Alam takun ayatee tutla AAalaykum fakuntum biha tukaththiboona

translations.en_sahih: [It will be said]. "Were not My verses recited to you and you used to deny them?"
translations.en_yusufali: "Were not My Signs rehearsed to you, and ye did but treat them as falsehood?"
translations.ms_basmeih: (Sambil dikatakan kepada mereka): "Bukankah ayat-ayatKu selalu dibacakan kepada kamu, lalu kamu terus-menerus mendustakannya?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ رَبَّنَا غَلَبَتْ عَلَيْنَا شِقْوَتُنَا وَكُنَّا قَوْمًا ضَآلِّينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo rabbana ghalabat AAalayna shiqwatuna wakunna qawman dalleena

translations.en_sahih: They will say, "Our Lord, our wretchedness overcame us, and we were a people astray.
translations.en_yusufali: They will say: "our Lord! Our misfortune overwhelmed us, and we became a people astray!
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka menjawab: "Wahai Tuhan kami, kami telah dikalahkan oleh sebab-sebab kecelakaan kami, dan dengan itu menjadilah kami kaum yang sesat.

ayahs.arabic: رَبَّنَآ أَخْرِجْنَا مِنْهَا فَإِنْ عُدْنَا فَإِنَّا ظَـٰلِمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Rabbana akhrijna minha fain AAudna fainna thalimoona

translations.en_sahih: Our Lord, remove us from it, and if we were to return [to evil], we would indeed be wrongdoers."
translations.en_yusufali: "Our Lord! bring us out of this: if ever we return (to Evil), then shall we be wrong-doers indeed!"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Wahai Tuhan kami, keluarkanlah kami dari neraka ini (serta kembalikanlah kami ke dunia); setelah itu kalau kami kembali lagi (mengerjakan kufur dan maksiat), maka sesungguhnya kami orang-orang yang zalim."

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ ٱخْسَـُٔوا۟ فِيهَا وَلَا تُكَلِّمُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala ikhsaoo feeha wala tukallimooni

translations.en_sahih: He will say, "Remain despised therein and do not speak to Me.
translations.en_yusufali: He will say: "Be ye driven into it (with ignominy)! And speak ye not to Me!
translations.ms_basmeih: (Allah) berfirman: "Diamlah kamu dengan kehinaan di dalam neraka, dan janganlah kamu berkata-kata (memohon sesuatupun) kepadaKu!

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ فَرِيقٌ مِّنْ عِبَادِى يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَآ ءَامَنَّا فَٱغْفِرْ لَنَا وَٱرْحَمْنَا وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ ٱلرَّٰحِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Innahu kana fareequn min AAibadee yaqooloona rabbana amanna faighfir lana wairhamna waanta khayru alrrahimeena

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, there was a party of My servants who said, 'Our Lord, we have believed, so forgive us and have mercy upon us, and You are the best of the merciful.'
translations.en_yusufali: "A part of My servants there was, who used to pray 'our Lord! we believe; then do Thou forgive us, and have mercy upon us: For Thou art the Best of those who show mercy!"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Sesungguhnya ada sepuak diri hamba-hambaKu (di dunia dahulu) memohon kepadaKu dengan berkata: ` Wahai Tuhan kami, kami telah beriman; oleh itu ampunkanlah dosa kami serta berilah rahmat kepada kami, dan sememangnya Engkaulah jua sebaik-baik Pemberi rahmat '.

ayahs.arabic: فَٱتَّخَذْتُمُوهُمْ سِخْرِيًّا حَتَّىٰٓ أَنسَوْكُمْ ذِكْرِى وَكُنتُم مِّنْهُمْ تَضْحَكُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faittakhathtumoohum sikhriyyan hatta ansawkum thikree wakuntum minhum tadhakoona

translations.en_sahih: But you took them in mockery to the point that they made you forget My remembrance, and you used to laugh at them.
translations.en_yusufali: "But ye treated them with ridicule, so much so that (ridicule of) them made you forget My Message while ye were laughing at them!
translations.ms_basmeih: "Maka kamu jadikan mereka ejek-ejekan sehingga ejek-ejekan kamu kepada mereka menyebabkan kamu lupa mengingati balasanKu, dan kamu pula sentiasa tertawakan mereka.

ayahs.arabic: إِنِّى جَزَيْتُهُمُ ٱلْيَوْمَ بِمَا صَبَرُوٓا۟ أَنَّهُمْ هُمُ ٱلْفَآئِزُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Innee jazaytuhumu alyawma bima sabaroo annahum humu alfaizoona

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, I have rewarded them this Day for their patient endurance - that they are the attainers [of success]."
translations.en_yusufali: "I have rewarded them this Day for their patience and constancy: they are indeed the ones that have achieved Bliss..."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Sesungguhnya Aku membalas mereka pada hari ini (dengan sebaik-baik balasan) disebabkan kesabaran mereka; sesungguhnya mereka itulah orang-orang yang berjaya".

ayahs.arabic: قَـٰلَ كَمْ لَبِثْتُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ عَدَدَ سِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala kam labithtum fee alardi AAadada sineena

translations.en_sahih: [Allah] will say, "How long did you remain on earth in number of years?"
translations.en_yusufali: He will say: "What number of years did ye stay on earth?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Allah bertanya lagi (kepada mereka yang kafir itu): "Berapa tahun lamanya kamu tinggal di bumi?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ لَبِثْنَا يَوْمًا أَوْ بَعْضَ يَوْمٍ فَسْـَٔلِ ٱلْعَآدِّينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo labithna yawman aw baAAda yawmin faisali alAAaddeena

translations.en_sahih: They will say, "We remained a day or part of a day; ask those who enumerate."
translations.en_yusufali: They will say: "We stayed a day or part of a day: but ask those who keep account."
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka menjawab: "Kami tinggal (di dunia) selama sehari atau sebahagian dari sehari; maka bertanyalah kepada golongan (malaikat) yang menjaga urusan menghitung

ayahs.arabic: قَـٰلَ إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا قَلِيلًا ۖ لَّوْ أَنَّكُمْ كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala in labithtum illa qaleelan law annakum kuntum taAAlamoona

translations.en_sahih: He will say, "You stayed not but a little - if only you had known.
translations.en_yusufali: He will say: "Ye stayed not but a little,- if ye had only known!
translations.ms_basmeih: Allah berfirman: "Kamu tidak tinggal (di dunia) melainkan sedikit masa sahaja, kalau kamu dahulu mengetahui hal ini (tentulah kamu bersiap sedia).

ayahs.arabic: أَفَحَسِبْتُمْ أَنَّمَا خَلَقْنَـٰكُمْ عَبَثًا وَأَنَّكُمْ إِلَيْنَا لَا تُرْجَعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Afahasibtum annama khalaqnakum AAabathan waannakum ilayna la turjaAAoona

translations.en_sahih: Then did you think that We created you uselessly and that to Us you would not be returned?"
translations.en_yusufali: "Did ye then think that We had created you in jest, and that ye would not be brought back to Us (for account)?"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Maka adakah patut kamu menyangka bahawa Kami hanya menciptakan kamu (dari tiada kepada ada) sahaja dengan tiada sebarang hikmat pada ciptaan itu? Dan kamu (menyangka pula) tidak akan dikembalikan kepada Kami?"

ayahs.arabic: فَتَعَـٰلَى ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمَلِكُ ٱلْحَقُّ ۖ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ رَبُّ ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱلْكَرِيمِ
ayahs.transliteration: FataAAala Allahu almaliku alhaqqu la ilaha illa huwa rabbu alAAarshi alkareemi

translations.en_sahih: So exalted is Allah, the Sovereign, the Truth; there is no deity except Him, Lord of the Noble Throne.
translations.en_yusufali: Therefore exalted be Allah, the King, the Reality: there is no god but He, the Lord of the Throne of Honour!
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka (dengan yang demikian) Maha Tinggilah Allah Yang Menguasai seluruh alam, lagi Yang Tetap Benar; tiada Tuhan melainkan Dia, Tuhan yang mempunyai Arasy yang mulia.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَن يَدْعُ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ لَا بُرْهَـٰنَ لَهُۥ بِهِۦ فَإِنَّمَا حِسَابُهُۥ عِندَ رَبِّهِۦٓ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُفْلِحُ ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waman yadAAu maAAa Allahi ilahan akhara la burhana lahu bihi fainnama hisabuhu AAinda rabbihi innahu la yuflihu alkafiroona

translations.en_sahih: And whoever invokes besides Allah another deity for which he has no proof - then his account is only with his Lord. Indeed, the disbelievers will not succeed.
translations.en_yusufali: If anyone invokes, besides Allah, Any other god, he has no authority therefor; and his reckoning will be only with his Lord! and verily the Unbelievers will fail to win through!
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesiapa yang menyembah tuhan yang lain bersama-sama Allah, dengan tidak berdasarkan sebarang keterangan mengenainya, maka sesungguhnya hitungannya (dan balasan amalnya yang jahat itu) disediakan di sisi Tuhannya. Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang kafir tidak akan berjaya.

ayahs.arabic: وَقُل رَّبِّ ٱغْفِرْ وَٱرْحَمْ وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ ٱلرَّٰحِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waqul rabbi ighfir wairham waanta khayru alrrahimeena

translations.en_sahih: And, [O Muhammad], say, "My Lord, forgive and have mercy, and You are the best of the merciful."
translations.en_yusufali: So say: "O my Lord! grant Thou forgiveness and mercy for Thou art the Best of those who show mercy!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan berdoalah (wahai Muhammad dengan berkata): "Wahai Tuhanku, berikanlah ampun dan kurniakan rahmat, dan sememangnya Engkaulah sahaja sebaik-baik Pemberi rahmat!"
